description: Running cargo test (and cargo test --features rlm) fails compiling crates/dspy-rs/examples/rlm_trajectory.rs due to missing RlmType derive import / rlm attributes not recognized. Errors include unresolved dspy_rs::rlm without the rlm feature and missing RlmType when features enabled. Investigate example gating/imports or feature setup.
title: cargo test fails building rlm_trajectory example without RlmType import

acceptance_criteria:
1. ToBamlValue trait defined and exported
2. All Rust primitives implemented
3. Unit tests for each primitive type
title: Define ToBamlValue trait and primitive implementations

description: [DSRs: crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/describe.rs] Generate RlmDescribe impl with type_name(), fields() returning RlmFieldDesc array, properties() returning RlmPropertyDesc array, is_iterable()/is_indexable(), describe_value() for preview.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 1.8): implement `RlmDescribe` generation in `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/describe.rs`.
Generates static `RlmFieldDesc`/`RlmPropertyDesc` arrays, type name, `describe_value()` preview (list length, string truncation), plus flags for iterable/indexable based on attrs.
Used later by `RlmVariable` + prompt generation.

title: Task 1.8: Implement RlmDescribe trait generation
